description.en: KOSIS (Korean Statistical Information Service) is the national statistics portal of South Korea, operated by Statistics Korea (KOSTAT). It serves as the one-stop portal for all official Korean statistics, providing access to over 1,000 statistical tables covering population, economy, society, environment, and regional data. KOSIS offers comprehensive open APIs for programmatic data access and supports international data comparisons through its global statistics section.
description.zh: KOSIS（韩国统计信息服务）是韩国国家统计门户，由韩国统计厅（KOSTAT）运营。它是获取所有官方韩国统计数据的一站式平台，提供1000多张统计表，涵盖人口、经济、社会、环境和区域数据。KOSIS提供全面的开放API用于程序化数据访问，并通过其全球统计部分支持国际数据比较。

en: Population and Census - resident population, census data, vital statistics
National Accounts - GDP, GNI, input-output tables
Employment and Labor - employment rate, unemployment, wages and working hours
Price Indices - CPI, PPI, export/import price indices
Industry and Mining - industrial production, mining output
Agriculture and Fisheries - crop production, livestock, fishery statistics
Trade and Services - retail sales, wholesale, service industry surveys
Housing and Construction - housing starts, construction permits, real estate prices
Education and Training - school enrollment, educational attainment
Health and Welfare - healthcare utilization, social welfare indicators
Environment and Energy - environmental pollution, energy consumption
Regional Statistics - provincial and municipal statistical data
International Comparisons - global statistics section with cross-country data
zh: 人口与普查 - 常住人口、普查数据、生命统计
国民账户 - GDP、GNI、投入产出表
就业与劳动 - 就业率、失业率、工资和工时
价格指数 - CPI、PPI、进出口价格指数
工业与采矿 - 工业生产、矿业产量
农业与渔业 - 农作物产量、畜牧业、渔业统计
贸易与服务 - 零售销售、批发、服务业调查
住房与建筑 - 新屋开工、建筑许可、房地产价格
教育与培训 - 学校入学率、教育程度
卫生与福利 - 医疗利用率、社会福利指标
环境与能源 - 环境污染、能源消耗
地区统计 - 省级和市级统计数据
国际比较 - 全球统计部分，跨国数据
